headline: Technical University Conversion Leaves 5 Institutions in Limbo
context: Five polytechnics designated for upgrade to technical university status in 2022 remain in administrative limbo in 2026.

cards.big: 5 polytechnics await technical university conversion announced 4 years ago in 2022
cards.sub: Students enrolled in diploma programs uncertain if degrees will be conferred

cards.big: Conversion requires MQA reaccreditation of 180 programs across 5 institutions
cards.sub: Accreditation backlog means earliest possible conversion is now 2028

cards.big: 12,000 students enrolled based on promised degree-granting status not yet approved
cards.sub: Marketing of these institutions as universities without legal authorization raises concerns

cards.big: Germany's Fachhochschulen model grants technical universities equal standing since 2009
cards.sub: Clear legislative framework prevents administrative uncertainty for institutions

cards.big: Announcing upgrades without completing accreditation misleads students who enrolled in good faith
Should polytechnic-to-university conversions require completion of accreditation before announcement
